description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle in manual mode was stationary at a red right turn arrow northeast on Folsom Street with brake lights and right turn signal 
illuminated, waiting to make a turn onto souttheast 2nd Street. Vehicle 2, behind the Zoox vehicle, proceeded and made contact with the left 
rear sensor and bumper of the Zoox vehicle. There were no injuries and police were not called. 
Print
Clear Form
